languageModelTools.name: ai4pb_get_init_session_prompt
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get the AI4PB init-session prompt template
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns the full AI4PB init-session prompt text from workprompt/initial-prompt.md. Use this when starting implementation from the architecture model and you need the exact prompt template without manual copy.

languageModelTools.name: ai4pb_get_wrap_up_prompt
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get the AI4PB wrap-up prompt template
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns the full AI4PB wrap-up prompt text from workprompt/Wrap-up Prompt.md. Use this when generating iteration summary and closure outputs.

languageModelTools.name: ai4pb_get_design_audit_prompt
languageModelTools.userDescription: Get the AI4PB design-audit prompt template
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Returns the full AI4PB design-audit prompt text from workprompt/reverse-engineer-WHOLE.md. Use this for design-code alignment or reverse-engineering checks.
